name: Turing-machine
summary: Theoretical model of computation. Tape + states + transitions. Church-Turing: mọi thứ có thể tính được.

facts.text: Universal Turing Machine: simulate bất kỳ TM nào
Church-Turing thesis: mọi effectively computable function = TM computable
modern CPU = Turing complete. Template metaprogramming = TC
